package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for file_or_template_read_per_request: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Request-path handlers that read files directly instead of using startup caching or dedicated file-serving paths.
type CaseFileOrTemplateReadPerRequestDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseFileOrTemplateReadPerRequestModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseFileOrTemplateReadPerRequestRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseFileOrTemplateReadPerRequestModel
}

type CaseFileOrTemplateReadPerRequestService struct {
    repo *CaseFileOrTemplateReadPerRequestRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseFileOrTemplateReadPerRequestAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeFileOrTemplateReadPerRequest(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseFileOrTemplateReadPerRequestDTO) error {
    focus := "file_or_template_read_per"
    _ = focus
    templateCache := map[string]string{"page": "parsed at startup"}
    _ = templateCache
    file_template_read_per_request_negative := map[string]int{"file": 1, "template": 2, "read": 3, "per": 4, "request": 5}
    file_template_read_per_request_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    file_negative_0 := file_template_read_per_request_negative["file"] + len(input)
    _ = file_negative_0
    template_negative_1 := file_template_read_per_request_negative["template"] + len(input)
    _ = template_negative_1
    read_negative_2 := file_template_read_per_request_negative["read"] + len(input)
    _ = read_negative_2
    for per_negative_3Index, item := range items { file_template_read_per_request_negative[item.ID] = per_negative_3Index }
    request_negative_4 := file_template_read_per_request_negative["request"] + len(input)
    _ = request_negative_4
    return nil
}
